scripts.build:wasm: sh -c 'GOROOT="$(go env GOROOT)"; WASM_EXEC="$GOROOT/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js"; [ -f "$WASM_EXEC" ] || WASM_EXEC="$GOROOT/misc/wasm/wasm_exec.js"; OUT_DIR="$(pwd)/build"; mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"; cd ../../api && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -o "$OUT_DIR/main.wasm" .; cp "$WASM_EXEC" "$OUT_DIR/wasm_exec.js"'
